scripts.i18n:translate: i18n-ai-translate translate -i messages/en.json -o es pt fr de ja ru ar hi -e claude -m claude-sonnet-4-5 -p '{' -s '}' --skip-translation-verification --skip-styling-verification --verbose
scripts.i18n:translate:zh: i18n-ai-translate translate -i messages/en.json -o zh -e claude -m claude-sonnet-4-5 -p '{' -s '}' --skip-translation-verification --skip-styling-verification --verbose && mv messages/zh.json messages/zh-CN.json
scripts.i18n:translate:all: npm run i18n:translate && npm run i18n:translate:zh
